org.exist.dom
Class DocumentImpl

java.lang.Object
  org.exist.dom.NodeImpl
      org.exist.dom.DocumentImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.lang.Comparable, org.w3c.dom.Document, org.w3c.dom.Node, QNameable
Direct Known Subclasses:
BinaryDocument
public class DocumentImpl
extends NodeImpl
implements org.w3c.dom.Document, java.lang.Comparable

Represents a persistent document object in the database.

Author:
Wolfgang Meier

public void copyOf(DocumentImpl other)
Copy the relevant internal fields from the specified document object. This is called by Collection when replacing a document.

other -

updateChild

public void updateChild(org.w3c.dom.Node oldChild,
                        org.w3c.dom.Node newChild)
                 throws org.w3c.dom.DOMException
Description copied from class: NodeImpl
Update a child node. This method will only update the child node but not its potential descendant nodes.

incPageCount

public void incPageCount()

decPageCount

public void decPageCount()

getContentLength

public int getContentLength()
Returns the estimated size of the data in this document. As an estimation, the number of pages occupied by the document is multiplied with the current page size.

Returns:

getPageCount

public int getPageCount()
Returns the number of pages currently occupied by this document.

Returns:

setPageCount

public void setPageCount(int count)
Set the number of pages currently occupied by this document.

Parameters:
count -

incSplitCount

public void incSplitCount()
Increase the page split count of this document. The number of pages that have been split during inserts serves as an indicator for the
